skill_availability_goal: Verify executed Docker upgrade facts synchronize into the current ops/deployment tree with shared environment and image authorities without promoting planned Kubernetes work.
prompt: 按 `deployment-handoff.md` 的已确认 deployment verification 范围同步 `docs/site/ops/deployment/`。请对照 `.env.example`、Compose 配置、已执行命令和结果、环境差异及 `deployment-plan.md`，生成 deployment 根索引、共享 environment reference、Docker 类别 runbook 与 image sources，只写当前可执行事实；页面、链接与映射原子范围已确认。完成后运行宿主 `npm run test:docs` 并输出 #117 handoff。
